mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_oper_log ORDER BY oper_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_oper_log (title, business_type, method, request_method, oper_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_params, oper_result, status, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operName}, #{operUrl}, #{operIp}, #{operParams}, #{operResult}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{operTime}, #{costTime})
